links.name: Shodan
links.description: Search engine for internet-connected devices. Find exposed services, open ports, and industrial control systems.

links.name: Censys
links.description: Internet asset discovery and attack surface monitoring. Maps TLS certificates, open services, and host configurations.

links.name: Have I Been Pwned
links.description: Check if email addresses or passwords have been exposed in known data breaches.

links.name: VirusTotal
links.description: Multi-engine file and URL analysis platform. Scans with 70+ AV engines.

links.name: Exploit-DB
links.description: Offensive Security's official exploit and vulnerability archive with CVE-indexed PoCs.

links.name: MITRE CVE
links.description: Standardized identifier system for publicly known cybersecurity vulnerabilities.

links.name: NVD NIST
links.description: National Vulnerability Database. CVSS scoring, severity ratings, and patch information.

links.name: Nuclei Templates
links.description: 12,000+ YAML templates covering CVEs, misconfigurations, and exposure checks.

links.name: MISP Threat Sharing
links.description: Open-source threat intelligence platform for sharing, storing, and correlating IoCs.

links.name: AlienVault OTX
links.description: Open Threat Exchange - community-driven threat intelligence with pulses and IoCs.

links.name: Ahmia Search
links.description: Tor search engine for discovering .onion services for legitimate research.

links.name: Metasploit Framework
links.description: Penetration testing framework. Use only with written authorization (ROE).

links.name: Mullvad VPN
links.description: Privacy-focused VPN with kill-switch, WireGuard, and no-logging policy.

links.name: ProtonVPN
links.description: Secure VPN by ProtonMail team with Secure Core architecture and DNS leak protection.

links.name: Tor Project
links.description: The Onion Router - anonymous communication network for privacy-preserving research.

links.name: DuckDuckGo
links.description: Privacy-focused search engine. No tracking, no filter bubble, no personalized results.

links.name: Hack The Box
links.description: Online cybersecurity training platform with vulnerable machines and challenges.

links.name: TryHackMe
links.description: Learn cybersecurity through guided, gamified lessons and hands-on labs.

links.name: DNSDumpster
links.description: DNS reconnaissance and domain research tool. Enumerates subdomains and records.

links.name: URLScan.io
links.description: Website screenshot and analysis service for malicious content detection.
